error.signature: Receiving messages from unexpected nodes on ROS_DOMAIN_ID=0

verdict.summary: Multiple ROS 2 systems on the same network use the same DOMAIN_ID, causing topic/service cross-talk.

dead_ends.action: Filter messages by node name in subscriber callbacks
dead_ends.why_fails: Does not prevent DDS discovery overhead or parameter/service collisions

dead_ends.action: Use different topic names for each robot system
dead_ends.why_fails: Does not prevent DDS discovery flooding; every node still discovers all others

workarounds.action: Assign unique ROS_DOMAIN_ID (0-101) to each independent system
workarounds.how: export ROS_DOMAIN_ID=42  # unique per system, range 0-101

workarounds.action: Use namespaces within a shared domain for cooperating robots
Use ROS_LOCALHOST_ONLY=1 for development on shared networks

frequently_confused_with.distinction: Discovery failure: nodes can't find each other. Domain ID conflict: nodes find TOO MANY other nodes from other systems.
